overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring first-person driving through a futuristic dystopian city with towering arcologies and elevated transit systems, transitioning to on-foot exploration of urban streets with neon billboards and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban arterial road with elevated transit tracks

events.description: slowing down and stopping at intersection behind other vehicles waiting at traffic light
exiting vehicle and transitioning from driving to on-foot perspective

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic in a futuristic city, passing towering arcology buildings and elevated transit lines

notable_agents.action: green van driving in adjacent lane alongside the player
black pickup truck stopped at the intersection ahead

entered.detail: tall white and blue tiered tower with multiple stacked platforms and industrial detailing
elevated monorail track structure running parallel to the street with support columns
tall red building with geometric facade patterns and metallic trim
red rectangular street sign with white text reading Crestmont suspended over the road
tall narrow tower with antenna spire visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with first-person driving through a futuristic urban canyon, flanked by a massive tiered arcology tower on the left and a red industrial building on the right. Elevated transit tracks run overhead as the vehicle navigates through moderate traffic, passing a green van and stopping behind a black pickup at the Crestmont intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with commercial billboards and crosswalks

events.description: transitioning from vehicle interior to pedestrian perspective, stepping onto the street crosswalk
crossing the street while vehicles pass by on the road

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection and along the sidewalk, observing the cyberpunk urban environment with neon signage

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket and shorts crossing the street in front of the camera
blue sports car driving past on the street

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure spanning across the street ahead
large pink neon billboard with stylized text and graphics on building facade
concrete wall with red graffiti text reading CORPORATE MUST DIE

segments.scene_description: Now on foot, the camera crosses the intersection and walks along the sidewalk, passing under the shadow of a massive elevated highway overpass. A prominent pink digital billboard glows on the right while a graffiti-covered wall on the left displays anti-corporate messaging. Pedestrians in colorful cyberpunk attire walk along the street as vehicles pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with commercial storefronts

events.description: moving underneath the elevated highway overpass into a covered, shaded area
turning slightly to follow the sidewalk curve under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk beneath the highway overpass, passing other pedestrians and street elements

notable_agents.action: man in orange cap and white tank top walking toward the camera

entered.detail: street sign indicating Highway 101 with speed limit 40 sign below
large colorful digital screen displaying abstract graphics on building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive concrete overpass, the scene becomes darker and more enclosed. The camera passes a Highway 101 sign and a large digital billboard while sharing the sidewalk with pedestrians. The elevated highway structure now dominates the left side as the path continues through the covered urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous transition from a high-speed drive through a futuristic urban canyon to a claustrophobic walk beneath a massive concrete overpass. It begins with a first-person perspective behind the wheel, navigating through traffic between a tiered arcology tower and a red industrial building under elevated transit tracks. As the vehicle stops at the Crestmont intersection, the perspective shifts to a pedestrian crossing the street and walking along a sidewalk flanked by a glowing pink digital billboard and graffiti-covered walls. The scene then moves deeper into the city's shadow, passing colorful pedestrians and a Highway 101 sign as the environment becomes darker and more enclosed. Finally, the camera continues through a covered urban corridor where the heavy concrete structure of the elevated highway dominates the skyline.
